mapper.sql: cg.id, cg.created_time, cg.created_timestamp, cg.created_by, cg.modified_time, cg.modified_timestamp, cg.modified_by, cg.version, cg.status, cg.group_name

cg.id, cg.created_time, cg.created_timestamp, cg.created_by, cg.created_id, cg.modified_time, cg.modified_timestamp, cg.modified_by, cg.modified_id, cg.deleted, cg.version, cg.remark, cg.status, cg.group_name, cg.group_avatar, cg.group_qrcode, cg.announcement, cg.limit_num, cg.show_nick_name_flag, cg.edit_avatar_flag, cg.org_id
mapper.delete: delete from chat_group where id in
mapper.select: select distinct cg.id from chat_group cg inner join chat_group_user cgu on cg.id = cgu.chat_group_id and cg.org_id = cgu.org_id and cgu.deleted = 0 where cg.deleted = 0 and cg.status = 1 and cg.org_id = #{orgId} and cgu.user_id = #{userId} and cgu.agree_flag = 1
